14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Auto Sleep & Shutdown"}]
15:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable automatic sleep consolidation (Hermes provider)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SESSION_END_TIMEOUT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"15"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max seconds for session-end sleep"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_TIMEOUT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max seconds for auto-sleep cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_TIMEOUT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"2"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max seconds to drain LLM queue on shutdown"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_PROMPT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Custom prompt for sleep LLM consolidation"}]]}]]}]]}]

memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DEGRADE_BATCH"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"100"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Batch size for tiered degradation pass"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SMART_COMPRESS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Use LLM for smart tiered compression instead of truncation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"300"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max character length for Tier 3 summaries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_USE_CAVEMAN"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Use caveman/AAAK encoding fallback for consolidation"}]]}]]}]]}]
18:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Veracity Weights"}]
19:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Veracity weight for stated (user-asserted) memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.7"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Veracity weight for inferred (LLM-extracted) memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Veracity weight for tool-returned memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.6"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Veracity weight for externally imported memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Veracity weight for memories with unknown source"}]]}]]}]]}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Embeddings & Vector Search"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions) for local embedding generation. No external API key is needed."]}]
1c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector storage format (int8, float32, float16, binary)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"fastembed model for vector embeddings"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_DIM"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"384"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Override embedding vector dimension"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API key for cloud embedding provider"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API dense vector retrieval entirely"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDINGS_VIA_API"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Force 1d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Scoring Weights (Hybrid Ranking)"}]

1f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"LLM Configuration (Sleep Summarization)"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep cycle uses an LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory. Can run locally or via an external API."}]

3a:["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_N_CTX"}]
